_comment: Copy to config/bridge-map.json and replace ids with your instance ids, channel ids, and WhatsApp group JIDs. Shared memory and relays stay disabled unless their feature flags are enabled.

instances._comment: Discord Remy instance; url is used by the HTTP transport in a later bridge task.
WhatsApp Garbanzo instance; url is used by the HTTP transport in a later bridge task.

routes._comment: Bridge the Remy Discord channel with the Garbanzo WhatsApp group. Commands are not relayed by default.
